name: Stark Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Stark Corporation Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the electric wire and cable business in Thailand and internationally. The company manufactures and sells medium to extra-high voltage, special-purpose, low-voltage, and other wires for building use; non-ferrous metals and plastics for electric wires and cables; and bare conductors, electric wires, cables, small cables, copper products, and non-ferrous products. It also manufactures, distributes, trades in, and provides service test for wire products made from copper and aluminum, which are used in electrical transition, telecommunications, and construction applications. In addition, it offers off-shore manpower services in various fields, including engineering, construction, and architecture; human resources services, such as visa and work permit applications, and payroll services; and engineering services comprising vessel cleaning, off-shore construction, and fabrication and maintenance services. Further, the company provides warehouses rental services; and equipment and machinery rental services, including power generators, welding machines, containers, wire rope slings, air compressors, and other related heavy machinery; transportation services; and consultancy services related to petroleum business, as well as wholesales telephone and telecommunications equipment. It serves governments, state-owned enterprises, and distributors, and developers; and owners operating in the power plant, infrastructure, public transportation, petrochemical, oil and gas, and real estate industries. The company was formerly known as Siam Inter Multimedia Public Company Limited and changed its name to Stark Corporation Public Company Limited in July 2019. Stark Corporation Public Company Limited was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
